name: folio
description: folio Layer 0 META FRAMEWORK — universal architecture spec-writing rules + Claude Code plugin harness. Consumed by Layer 1 projects via folio.config.yaml.

spec_path.description: Relative path (from consumer project root) where folio-managed spec HTML files live.

caller_marker_env.description: Environment variable name that AI agent must set before editing files under spec_path.

caller_marker_value.description: Expected value of the caller marker env var. Hook denies edit if env var is unset or differs.

review_model.description: LLM model for Phase F specialist review agents. Overridable per consumer project.

_placeholders.skills: Planned: folio-init, folio-architect, folio-spec-edit, folio-validate, folio-review-{vocabulary,structure,ssot,temporal} (Phase X2 implementation).
_placeholders.hooks: Planned: PreToolUse caller-marker enforce, PostToolUse spec-validate (Phase X2 implementation).
_placeholders.scripts: Planned: link-integrity.py, orphan-check.py, declarative-check.py, what-only-check.py (Phase X2 implementation).
_placeholders.bin: Planned: folio (shell wrapper for `folio validate`, `folio init`) (Phase X2 implementation).
